title: Texas Senate race ad spending projected at $446 million, report says
shortDescription: With Paxton and Talarico tied in the polls, forecasters project a record $446 million ad war in Texas Senate race.

title: Supreme Court loosens law barring marijuana users from owning guns
shortDescription: The Supreme Court said a man's every-other-day marijuana use is not a reason to bar him from having a gun, a decision weakening a federal gun control law.

title: Aerial shows scale of Trump's changes to DC
shortDescription: An aerial image captured the drastic changes to the National Mall, following renovations backed by President Donald Trump.

title: Why some states count late ballots – and what could change
shortDescription: The Supreme Court may decide if states can count mail ballots received after Election Day, impacting swing states.

title: Republicans in Congress keep bucking Trump. See who voted against him.
shortDescription: USA TODAY compiled a rundown of recent votes, including on the Iran war and anti-weaponization fund, in which some Republicans sided with Democrats.

title: Dems investigate Jan. 6 contractor’s role in 250th planning
shortDescription: Democratic lawmakers are questioning whether the White House subverted contracting rules to award Event Strategies Inc. millions in federal contracts.

title: Trump keeps blowing up the Senate's plans, 'undermining' Republicans
shortDescription: President Trump keeps upending Republicans' plans, frustrated lawmakers say, "undermining our ability to produce the very results he wants."

title: Pastors for Trump founder drops out of House election amid scandal
shortDescription: An Oklahoma pastor running for Congress dropped out of the race only a day after advancing to a runoff amid a text-messaging scandal.

title: Lawmakers react to Trump's US-Iran deal. Here's what they're saying
shortDescription: President Trump has touted the interim agreement between the U.S. and Iran as a major step toward peace. See lawmakers' mixed reactions.

title: This aerial photo captures everything unfolding around the White House
shortDescription: An aerial photo captures a chaotic and green Washington, DC. Here's what's going on around the White House.
